name: council-of-high-intelligence
description: Multi-persona deliberation framework: 18 historical-thinker council members for structured analysis of complex decisions, with native MCP multi-provider routing.

settings.name: ROUTING_PROFILE
settings.description: Council MCP routing profile. 'auto' uses single Gemini model for all members. 'mcp-multi' distributes members across declared MCP servers per configs/mcp-provider-slots.yaml.
